meta.title: Q3 2026 Business Update
meta.lead: Quarterly performance against target — what moved, what's at risk, and the decisions we need this quarter.
meta.author: Prepared by Finance & Operations

slides.heading: Performance vs target
slides.note: Where the quarter landed against the plan we committed in January.

slides.heading: Revenue tracked above target from August
slides.body: July closed marginally under plan; August and September both beat target on the strength of two enterprise renewals and the phased go-live of the logistics engagement.

slides.heading: Unit economics held while volume grew
slides.note: Quarter-on-quarter movement in the metrics leadership tracks.

slides.heading: What moved the needle
slides.note: The three drivers behind the beat — and one drag.

cards.heading: Enterprise renewals
cards.text: Both flagship accounts renewed multi-year with expanded scope.

cards.heading: Logistics go-live
cards.text: Phase 1 delivered on time; phase 2 booked for Q4.

cards.heading: Advisory upsell
cards.text: Optimisation reviews converted into three delivery engagements.

cards.heading: Drag: onboarding lag
cards.text: Two new-client starts slipped into Q4, deferring recognised revenue.

items: Two strategic pursuits at contract stage

slides.heading: The road to year-end
slides.note: Milestones between now and the January board meeting.

milestones.label: October
milestones.title: Q4 hiring approved
milestones.description: Two senior delivery roles signed off and posted.

milestones.label: November
milestones.title: Public-sector bid decision
milestones.description: Go/no-go with the bid team allocated through the decision date.

milestones.label: December
milestones.title: CS recovery checkpoint
milestones.description: NPS re-survey of the five detractor accounts.

milestones.label: January
milestones.title: Board review
milestones.description: Full-year close and the FY27 plan.

slides.heading: Where we stand vs where we planned
slides.note: The January plan against the Q3 close.

left.title: January plan
items: Two enterprise renewals at flat scope

slides.quote: The renewals weren't bought — they were earned by the delivery team showing up every single sprint.

slides.caption: Delivery pipeline, simplified. Source: operations playbook.

rows: Recovery plan with top 5 detractor accounts

slides.heading: What we need from this group
slides.lead: Three approvals to bank the momentum and de-risk Q4.

cards.heading: Hire ahead of demand
cards.text: Approve two senior delivery hires to protect the Q4 start dates.

cards.heading: Fund the CS recovery plan
cards.text: Dedicated success manager for the mid-market detractor accounts.

cards.heading: Commit to the public-sector bid
cards.text: Bid team allocation through November decision date.
